completion_data.completion_summary: Completed 9-phase publication preparation for bimodal temporal logic metalogic. Publication path is now sorry-free with zero custom axioms. Archived DovetailingChain.lean, updated export files, fixed deprecated Mathlib API, created comprehensive sorry registry and Boneyard documentation.
